data.title: 28.13%, 26.4%! LONGi Sets New World Records for Crystalline Silicon Solar Cell and Module Efficiency
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on April 29, 2026, LONGi revealed two significant advancements in technology. One notable achievement is the certification of their independently created Hybrid Interdigitated-Back-Contact (HIBC) solar cell by the Institute for Solar Energy Research Hamelin (ISFH) in Germany.

data.title: Robinhood's Q1 earnings fall short as crypto revenue, volume drop about 50%, causing share prices to drop 10%.
data.description: In the first quarter of the year, Robinhood reported earnings per share and revenue figures that fell short of industry projections. This led to a drop of almost 10% in the company's stock value.

data.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy firm has been crucial in Bitcoin's recent surge, with ETFs and whale purchases also playing a part - Bitwise CIO.
data.description: The recent surge in Bitcoin's value has been primarily fueled by ongoing purchases from Michael Saylor's treasury firm, Strategy, as per Bitwise's chief investment officer. Although Bitcoin exchange-traded funds and large-scale purchases by significant investors have played a role, a notable driving force behind the rally has been the consistent buying activity from Saylor's firm.

data.title: EigenCloud recently hosted a Seoul event discussing AI-crypto synergy, addressing challenges like agent ownership. #AI #Crypto #Seoul
data.description: During EigenCloud's Agentic Seoul event, discussions revolved around the integration of artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency. The event specifically addressed practical challenges such as agent ownership and programmable payments. This informative gathering delved into important issues relating to the merging of AI and crypto technologies.

data.title: Anthropic introduces Claude AI integrations for Adobe, Blender, etc., boosting creative workflows with AI. #innovation #AI
data.description: Anthropic has recently launched Claude AI connectors for leading software like Adobe, Blender, and others. These connectors are designed to enhance creative workflows by incorporating AI-assisted tools. The aim is to optimize efficiency and productivity for users working with these applications. With this development, users can expect a smoother and more streamlined creative process, leveraging the power of artificial intelligence. This move showcases a commitment to innovation and progress in the creative industry, with potential significant impacts on how content is created and managed moving forward.

data.title: NVIDIA AI boosts subsurface engineering with 24/7 autonomous workflows, reducing delays and optimizing efficiency.
data.description: NVIDIA's AI technology has revolutionized simulation in subsurface engineering, significantly reducing delays and enhancing efficiency through continuous autonomous workflows. This cutting-edge development is characterized by its 24/7 operation, marking a significant advancement in the field.
